members.name: _PopupMenu
members.summary: Called when creating a context menu, custom options can be added by using the [method add_context_menu_item] or [method add_context_menu_item_from_shortcut] functions. [param paths] contains currently selected paths (depending on menu), which can be used to conditionally add options.

members.name: AddContextMenuItem
members.signature: public void AddContextMenuItem(String name, Callable callback, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Add custom option to the context menu of the plugin's specified slot. When the option is activated, [param callback] will be called. Callback should take single [Array] argument; array contents depend on context menu slot. [codeblock] func _popup_menu(paths): add_context_menu_item("File Custom options", handle, ICON) [/codeblock] If you want to assign shortcut to the menu item, use [method add_context_menu_item_from_shortcut] instead.

members.name: AddContextMenuItemFromShortcut
members.signature: public void AddContextMenuItemFromShortcut(String name, Shortcut shortcut, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Add custom option to the context menu of the plugin's specified slot. The option will have the [param shortcut] assigned and reuse its callback. The shortcut has to be registered beforehand with [method add_menu_shortcut]. [codeblock] func _init(): add_menu_shortcut(SHORTCUT, handle) func _popup_menu(paths): add_context_menu_item_from_shortcut("File Custom options", SHORTCUT, ICON) [/codeblock]

members.name: AddContextSubmenuItem
members.signature: public void AddContextSubmenuItem(String name, PopupMenu menu, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Add a submenu to the context menu of the plugin's specified slot. The submenu is not automatically handled, you need to connect to its signals yourself. Also the submenu is freed on every popup, so provide a new [PopupMenu] every time. [codeblock] func _popup_menu(paths): var popup_menu = PopupMenu.new() popup_menu.add_item("Blue") popup_menu.add_item("White") popup_menu.id_pressed.connect(_on_color_submenu_option) add_context_submenu_item("Set Node Color", popup_menu) [/codeblock]

members.name: AddMenuShortcut
members.signature: public void AddMenuShortcut(Shortcut shortcut, Callable callback)
members.summary: Registers a shortcut associated with the plugin's context menu. This method should be called once (e.g. in plugin's [method Object._init]). [param callback] will be called when user presses the specified [param shortcut] while the menu's context is in effect (e.g. FileSystem dock is focused). Callback should take single [Array] argument; array contents depend on context menu slot. [codeblock] func _init(): add_menu_shortcut(SHORTCUT, handle) [/codeblock]

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_2D_EDITOR
values.summary: Context menu of 2D editor's basic right-click menu. [method _popup_menu] will be called with paths to all [CanvasItem] nodes under the cursor. You can fetch them using this code: [codeblock] func _popup_menu(paths): var canvas_item = Engine.get_main_loop().root.get_node(paths[0]); # Replace 0 with the desired index. [/codeblock] The paths array is empty if there weren't any nodes under cursor. The option callback will receive a typed array of [CanvasItem] nodes.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_FILESYSTEM
values.summary: Context menu of FileSystem dock. [method _popup_menu] and option callback will be called with list of paths of the currently selected files.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_FILESYSTEM_CREATE
values.summary: The "Create..." submenu of FileSystem dock's context menu, or the "New" section of the main context menu when empty space is clicked. [method _popup_menu] and option callback will be called with the path of the currently selected folder. When clicking the empty space, the list of paths for popup method will be empty. [codeblock] func _popup_menu(paths): if paths.is_empty(): add_context_menu_item("New Image File...", create_image) else: add_context_menu_item("Image File...", create_image) [/codeblock]

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_INSPECTOR_PROPERTY
values.summary: Context menu of the inspectors right-click menu. [method _popup_menu] will be called with an array of two items: The first will be the object's ID, the second will be the property name. An object can be retrieved from it's ID via [method @GlobalScope.instance_from_id] after converting it to an int. The option callback will receive the EditorProperty directly.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_SCENE_TABS
values.summary: Context menu of scene tabs. [method _popup_menu] will be called with the path of the clicked scene, or empty [PackedStringArray] if the menu was opened on empty space. The option callback will receive the path of the clicked scene, or empty [String] if none was clicked.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_SCENE_TREE
values.summary: Context menu of Scene dock. [method _popup_menu] will be called with a list of paths to currently selected nodes, while option callback will receive the list of currently selected nodes.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_SCRIPT_EDITOR
values.summary: Context menu of Script editor's script tabs. [method _popup_menu] will be called with the path to the currently edited script, while option callback will receive reference to that script.

values.name: CONTEXT_SLOT_SCRIPT_EDITOR_CODE
values.summary: Context menu of Script editor's code editor. [method _popup_menu] will be called with the path to the [CodeEdit] node. You can fetch it using this code: [codeblock] func _popup_menu(paths): var code_edit = Engine.get_main_loop().root.get_node(paths[0]); [/codeblock] The option callback will receive reference to that node. You can use [CodeEdit] methods to perform symbol lookups etc.
